title: 20:24 â August 7, 2020
body_text:
20:24 â August 7, 2020
FX Drafts Part Update
Western Union Business Solutions (WUBS) has migrated FX Drafts to a new platform. Please see the FX Drafts Part in the Payment Solutions Manual for updates on procedures and resource material.
Access and Administration Volume
User Management Part
Section 9.8, FX Drafts
We updated the procedures for providing access to FX Drafts in User Management.
Clearing and Deposits Volume
FX Drafts Part
Section 1.2, System Requirements for FX Drafts
New
Section 1.3, Contacts, Websites, and Other Resources
We made minor updates to this section.
Section 3.1, Overview of Legal Considerations
We revised this section and added a cross reference to Parts in the Operations Manual Program for more in-depth information on anti-money laundering requirements. (The Operations Manual Program is offered on a subscription basis to Central 1âs BC and Ontario members only. For more information or to inquire about subscribing to the Program, contact Central 1, Product Compliance & Design.)
Chapter 6, FX Drafts User Management
Access to FX Notes is granted in CPS Admin or User Management. However, user permissions are now set up within the FX Drafts application by an FX Drafts user with admin access. We updated this Chapter to reflect those changes.
Chapter 8, Contingency Procedures for Stop Payment Requests and Desktop Draft Stock Orders
We added this Chapter with procedures and forms that financial institutions can use if the FX Drafts application is not available.
